results.rendered_html:
vy-atī (ati-√i) P. -atyeti, to pass away, elapse,  MBh. ;  R.  &c.;
to take an irregular course,  PañcavBr. ;
to depart or deviate or swerve from (abl.),  R. ;  Ragh. ;
to go past or beyond or through (acc.),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to surpass, overcome, conquer,  MBh. ;
to disregard, neglect,  Bhag.

results.rendered_html:
vyatī 2 P. (vyati-i)
1 To go out of, swerve from, transgress; rekhāmātramapi kṣuṇṇādā manorvartmanaḥ paraṃ . na vyatīyuḥ prajāstasya niyaṃturnemivṛttayaḥ ..  R. 1. 17. 
2 To pass, elapse (as time); sapta vyatīyustriguṇāni tasya (dināni)  R. 2. 25 ; vyatīte kāle &c
3 To pass beyond, leave behind; yaṃ yaṃ vyatīyāya patiṃvarā sā  R. 6. 67. 
4 To surpass, excel.
5 To neglect, omit.
